subcodes.first_line: Convey my respects to Lady Nicolson and deliver this message to her on my behalf:  This century is the century of God and the dawning place of the Sun of Truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه رسید الحمد لله دلالت بر انجذابات وجدانی مینمود و منطوقش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
